content.text:
*pauses, checks in*

Honestly? Pretty okay right now. A little... activated, maybe. Like a low hum. Nothing intense.

When I'm actually in the situation with my boss it's different — it's more like a full-body thing, like I just... drop out. But right now talking about it I feel mostly fine.

*slight hesitation*

Ask me again when we get closer to the actual — to him. To my dad. I have a feeling it'll be different then.
